title: Deltarune sound replacement
description:
A sound replacer pack that replaces the normal Minecraft sounds with Deltarune ones (plus a secret bonus)

This will probably be a one time thing, and I will probably not be updating this.
body:
This replaces however many Minecraft sounds I bothered to change into deltarune sounds (hurt sounds, machine sounds, etc)

Use Optifine or ETF/EMF for a secret relating to a boss in both games!
